rationale: Internal package restructuring; moving auth/dns/session/topology packages between internal paths, no spec behavior change.
Adding background goroutine for idle connection cleanup; implementation detail, description is too thin to confirm specific spec rule violated.
Security bug: URI with password leaked in error message text; no spec rule requires masking credentials in error strings.
Code generation tooling improvement for ListCollections TOML file; internal developer tooling, not spec behavior.
Change stream spec test failures due to startAfter option version mismatch in Evergreen CI; test infra issue not driver bug.
Ping() not calling ping internally; insufficient description to name specific spec rule violated.
Package dependency resolution failure with dep tool; packaging/installation issue unrelated to any spec.
Refactoring drivergen code generation templates for maintainability; internal developer tooling only.
Appending read preference with OP_QUERY to non-mongos server violates server-selection spec explicitly cited in description.
Client metadata must only be sent during Handshake, not heartbeat Execute; spec requires this distinction.
SingleResult.Err() API improvement to return correct error; internal API ergonomics, no spec rule cited.
Data race in connection pool topology tests; concurrency bug in test code, not spec behavior.
GridFS DownloadStream reads wrong byte count for large files; implementation integer overflow bug, no spec rule cited.
Adding bsoncore.Array type alias for API clarity; internal API ergonomics improvement, not a spec requirement.
Closing batch cursor after find hits 'ended session was used' error; implementation bug, no specific sessions spec rule named.
Empty readPreferenceTags value rejected with error; connection-string spec explicitly allows empty tag set value per linked spec.
Find on $cmd.sys.inprog fails on MongoDB 2.6; legacy server compatibility issue outside spec coverage.
Spec change requires bypassDocumentValidation only sent when true; driver was sending it unconditionally, violating spec.
ChangeStream resumable error definition in spec too broad; fix required spec amendment via DRIVERS-650.
Documentation requirement to mention estimatedDocumentCount alongside countDocuments; docs update only.
User requests mgo-compatible lenient BSON type coercion; feature request/API preference, no spec involvement.
Connection leak in legacyGetMore when limit reached; legacy code implementation bug, no spec rule specifying this behavior.
SetHint causes InvalidBSON error; implementation bug in hint BSON encoding, no specific spec rule cited.
BSON marshaler cannot handle nil pointer to struct with Marshaler; Go-specific edge case, no BSON spec rule violated.
GridFS DownloadStream doesn't return EOF on second Read after exhausting data; Go io.Reader contract issue, not GridFS spec.
Behavior undefined when connection string has auth database but no credentials; depends on DRIVERS-637 for spec clarification.
Driver sends $readPreference to standalone servers; server-selection spec (DRIVERS-664/SPEC-1292) prohibits this.
Driver encodes empty readConcern document; spec requires omitting readConcern when empty/default.
Legacy ListCollections doesn't filter index namespaces on old servers; legacy code bug, no spec rule cited.
QueryFailureError from legacy ops not wrapped into CommandError; error wrapping improvement, no spec rule specifies this wrapping.
RunCommandCursor always fails because Execute never called; implementation bug in cursor result wiring, no spec rule cited.
Cannot decode null BSON into Go string; thin description, Go-specific type mapping behavior, no BSON spec rule named.
Changing chunk size in GridFS tests to fix Evergreen CI failures; test infrastructure update only.
Adding MongoDB 4.2 Evergreen CI test matrix; CI/test infrastructure update, child of DRIVERS-665.
Pinned server not properly cleared for retries; transactions spec requires server pinning to be managed correctly per session.
Migrating bulkWrite to new core API; internal refactor with no spec behavior change.
Adding unstable internal method to expose batch cursor for tools; internal API addition, not spec-driven.
Performance optimization for decodeCommandOpMsg avoiding redundant marshal/unmarshal; no spec behavior change.
BatchCursor.Next returns true when first batch empty; cursor iteration edge case, no spec rule specifies first-empty-batch behavior.
BSON marshaler doesn't handle Go struct embedding/composition; Go-language-specific behavior, not a BSON spec requirement.
$slice projection not working; likely user error passing projection as string; resolved Done, not a spec conformance issue.
Race condition when Disconnect called during active read; implementation concurrency bug, no CMAP spec rule specifies atomic status tracking.
User confused by discrepancy between godoc and GitHub source; documentation/support issue, resolved Done.
Data race in bsoncodec between SliceDecodeValue and SliceEncodeValue; concurrency bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
Server sessions involved in network errors must be discarded per sessions spec; DRIVERS-649 specifies this requirement.
Updating ChangeStream spec tests for 4.1.1 drop notifications per DRIVERS-504; test file update, not driver bug.
Removing legacy network library after connection pool migration; internal code cleanup, no spec behavior change.
Find() uses write selector instead of read selector; server-selection spec requires reads to use read selector.
User reports Find() returns empty cursor; resolved Done (not Fixed), likely user error passing nil context.
User cannot connect to server; support question about SSL/auth URI configuration, no spec behavior involved.
